items.title: Samsung Health app threatens data deletion if users opt out AI training
items.title_zh: 三星健康APP：拒绝AI训练将删除用户数据
items.title_en: Samsung Health Threatens Data Deletion Over AI Training Opt-Out
items.summary: Samsung Health app threatens to delete user data if they opt out of AI training, raising major privacy and data ownership concerns.

items.title: Chain of Thought is a scaling trap. the next wave is latent reasoning (Coconut / HRM / RecrusiveMAS)... but then we hit the black box wall. Where does BDH fit? [D]
items.title_zh: 思维链是规模陷阱；潜在推理兴起
items.title_en: CoT is a scaling trap; latent reasoning emerges
items.summary: Argues that Chain of Thought reasoning in LLMs is a scaling trap and proposes latent reasoning methods as the next direction, but warns of black-box challenges.

items.title: Building and Shipping Mac and iOS Apps Without Ever Opening Xcode
items.title_zh: 通过LLM代理构建苹果应用，无需Xcode
items.title_en: Building Apple Apps Without Xcode via LLM Agents
items.summary: A blog post describes how to build, sign, and notarize Mac and iOS apps entirely via command-line tools and LLM agents (e.g., Claude), without ever opening Xcode.

items.title: Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API, benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor
items.title_zh: 苹果 SpeechAnalyzer API 在速度上超越 Whisper，准确性略低
items.title_en: Apple's SpeechAnalyzer API beats Whisper in speed, slightly less accurate
items.summary: Apple's new SpeechAnalyzer API is benchmarked against Whisper and its predecessor, showing substantially faster performance with only slightly lower accuracy.

items.title: Climate.gov was destroyed. Open data saved it
items.title_zh: 开放数据拯救被毁的气候.gov数据
items.title_en: Open data saved climate.gov after destruction
items.summary: A blog post detailing how open data initiatives saved climate.gov data after it was removed, sparking discussion on data ownership and decentralized storage.

items.title: Telegram's t.me domain has been suspended
items.summary: Telegram's t.me domain was suspended, likely due to regulatory actions in Russia, France, or India, with technical details indicating registry-level action.

items.title: LAPD lets contract with surveillance giant Flock expire
items.title_zh: 洛杉矶警察局因隐私担忧终止与Flock的合同
items.title_en: LAPD ends Flock contract over privacy concerns
items.summary: LAPD ends contract with Flock over civil liberties concerns, but comments reveal Flock's resilient data harvesting model.

items.title: GPUHedge: Hedging serverless GPU providers improves cold start p95 latency from 117s to 30s [P]
items.title_zh: GPUHedge 将无服务器 GPU 冷启动延迟降低 74%
items.title_en: GPUHedge reduces serverless GPU cold start latency by 74%
items.summary: GPUHedge uses speculative execution to hedge across serverless GPU providers, reducing cold start p95 latency from 117s to 30s.
